content:
The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
— Walt Disney
summary: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.

content:
Life is what happens when you're busy making other plans.
— John Lennon
summary: Life is what happens when you're busy making other plans.

content:
The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
— Eleanor Roosevelt
summary: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.

content:
It is during our darkest moments that we must focus to see the light.
— Aristotle
summary: It is during our darkest moments that we must focus to see the light.

content:
Whoever is happy will make others happy too.
— Anne Frank
summary: Whoever is happy will make others happy too.
